description_long: This is a large, cylindrical blue metal barrel with a flat top and bottom, featuring two prominent horizontal reinforcement bands around its circumference. The barrel has a small circular cap or bung on the top surface, from which a viscous, neon yellow-green liquid appears to be leaking and dripping down the side. One side of the barrel displays a prominent yellow warning label with a black radiation symbol and the word 'RADIOACTIVE', indicating hazardous contents. The surface of the barrel is slightly weathered, with visible scuffs and a matte finish, suggesting outdoor or industrial use. The overall construction appears robust, designed to contain dangerous materials securely.
description: A large blue metal barrel with reinforcement bands, a radioactive warning label, and neon yellow-green liquid leaking from the top.
description_view_0: The blue barrel is seen from the side, showing its cylindrical shape, reinforcement bands, and the top cap with some yellow-green liquid visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the radioactive warning label and the most prominent streaks of leaking neon yellow-green liquid down the side.
description_view_2: The barrel is rotated to show the side opposite the label, with only a small part of the warning label and cap visible.
description_view_3: The rear view of the barrel, showing a clean blue surface with reinforcement bands and a hint of the yellow-green cap.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: radioactive warning label with symbol and text
